name: get_intraday_activity
description: Retrieve high-resolution intraday activity data with minute-level granularity. Returns heart rate, steps, calories, and elevation data points throughout the day. Ideal for detailed activity analysis, workout detection, or building activity timelines.

parameters.name: startdate
parameters.description: Start of the time range as a Unix timestamp.

parameters.name: enddate
parameters.description: End of the time range as a Unix timestamp. Max 24 hours from startdate.

parameters.name: data_fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to return: heart_rate, steps, elevation, calories, distance.
